scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pioneer-ui/shared build && pnpm --filter @pioneer-ui/tokens build && pnpm --filter @pioneer-ui/registry build && pnpm --filter @pioneer-ui/installer build && pnpm --filter pioneer-ui build && pnpm registry:generate && pnpm --filter @pioneer-ui/docs build && pnpm --filter @pioneer-ui/vite-react-example build && pnpm --filter @pioneer-ui/next-app-example build
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
